rubric_content.text_property: The final response MUST include a Cloud Storage location path (containing 'gs://' or a GCS bucket/folder reference) where the generated creatives were saved.

The final response MUST indicate that the ad creatives were generated and exported — i.e. it references the produced ad copy and/or visual concepts and the location of the exported artifacts (research report, evaluation report, or HTML gallery).

The agent MUST execute the creative pipeline in the correct logical order: first memorize the campaign metadata and trend, then run combined_research_pipeline, then save_draft_report_artifact, then ad_creative_pipeline, then visual_production_pipeline, then creative_eval_agent, then persist results (save_eval_report_to_gcs, save_creative_gallery_html, write_trends_to_bq, write_eval_report_to_bq).

The agent MUST call all of these tools at least once: memorize, combined_research_pipeline, save_draft_report_artifact, ad_creative_pipeline, visual_production_pipeline, creative_eval_agent, save_eval_report_to_gcs, save_creative_gallery_html, write_trends_to_bq, write_eval_report_to_bq.
